deploymentHealthChecks.name: sql-operational-store-connectivity
deploymentHealthChecks.description: Confirms the SQL-first operational store is reachable before migration execution is enabled.

deploymentHealthChecks.name: worker-heartbeat-readiness
deploymentHealthChecks.description: Confirms workers can publish lifecycle and heartbeat evidence before live work is admitted.

deploymentHealthChecks.name: telemetry-ingestion-readiness
deploymentHealthChecks.description: Confirms deployment telemetry can be emitted and queried for the target environment.
